sentence: 妇联组织了一场公益活动。
pinyin: Fùlián zǔzhī le yī chǎng gōngyì huódòng.
english: The women's association organized a charity event.

sentence: 这款车载导航系统非常好用。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chē zài dǎoháng xìtǒng fēicháng hǎo yòng.
english: This onboard navigation system is very easy to use.

sentence: 当时列国之间贸易往来频繁。
pinyin: Dāngshí liè guó zhījiān màoyì wǎnglái pínfán.
english: At that time, trade between various countries was very frequent.

sentence: 他特别喜欢看科教频道的节目。
pinyin: Tā tèbié xǐhuān kàn kē jiào píndào de jiémù.
english: He especially likes watching programs on the science education channel.

sentence: 这批产品主要用于外销。
pinyin: Zhè pī chǎnpǐn zhǔyào yòng yú wài xiāo.
english: This batch of products is mainly intended for export.
